notes: SHIP v1.14.330 - INSPECT-3D LANDING: on Master load the Command hero lands on the first rack, live in the INSPECT-3D bay (HANDOFF-INSPECT3D-LANDING.md web-Claude + gemini-code restatement, same feature). Routing + mount + state ONLY - reh3d engine, materials/lights/camera (RACK SCENE LOCK), and the Master pipeline are UNTOUCHED. NEW top slot #cc-rackhero (first child of #pg-cmd, hidden by default) mounts the live scene; the existing lens/verbs/ghost + all rows are unchanged below it. cmd_mountRackHero(): no Master -> slot hidden + any live scene torn down (empty state = byte-identical to pre-.330); Master -> land the first rack live. cmd_resolveFirstRackElev(): builds a RENDER-READY elevation via master_rackToElevation(racksByCab[cabId], cabId) - the same builder the reh3d panel uses - so slots are always populated; D1 = active-deployment lead rack (deploy_getActiveId -> deploy_loadRacks -> existing blocked-first/id comparator) WHEN it maps to a real Master rack, else Master-order first rack Object.keys(racksByCab)[0]. Mount reuses the engine's rackElevation_render3D(elev, mount) directly (single live GL context enforced by its _reh3dActive guard); cmd_rackHero3D lazy-loads SW-precached three.min.js with a HERO-scoped guard. Wired at the tail of cmd_render() (single door - covers both master-load via cmd_loadMaster and nav-entry via showMode('command')). Teardown: showMode() disposes the hero scene (mount._rm3dDispose) when LEAVING Command - pages go display:none not removed, so without this the render RAF keeps drawing a hidden canvas = battery drain; re-mounts on return. D2 RULED (owner, this session): live 3D on EVERY surface incl. phone (46vh height cap); FLAT (rackElevation_buildHtml) is a WebGL-capability fallback only. DEVIATIONS from spec (reported): (1) spec's AWAITING MASTER hero placeholder does NOT exist in live .329 (Command was rebuilt in the .277-.293 arc) - so instead of swapping a placeholder, added a dedicated hidden top slot (empty state stays byte-identical). (2) spec said reuse reh3d_setMode('3d'); that fn is reh3d-PANEL-coupled (toggles panel buttons + flips the session pref) - called rackElevation_render3D directly instead, which IS the engine's mount-into-any-element entry (spec's own 'reuse where it's mounted' intent). (3) resolver anchored on the Master's racksByCab order (bulletproof, render-ready) since recon proved there is no Master-order DEPLOYMENT primitive and deployments are a separate store. CSS is bare #pg-cmd (redesign-only page, never rendered under legacy - matches the sibling .ghosthero rules). Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, sw.js ok, version.json valid, CSS brace net-0, three-stamp .329->.330 lockstep, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (#pg-cmd + all edits are redesign-only; empty-state hero is hidden). DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA, hard-refresh first): load a Master -> Command lands with the first rack live in 3D at the top (rotates/pans like the INSPECT-3D bay), caption 'RACK - <id>'; no Master -> hero absent, page as before; leave + return to Command -> scene tears down and re-mounts (no runaway battery); phone renders live (not FLAT) where WebGL is available. ROLLBACK: revert the markup slot + CSS + the 4 JS functions + the cmd_render/showMode wire lines + 3 stamps.
